jd_summary: Decentralized Learning team L&D specialist. Create and develop instructor-led and eLearning content using authoring and LMS tools, applying adult learning theory; facilitate instructor-led courses for in-person and remote audiences; collaborate with SMEs to source content; audit and update training content using SME and learner feedback; reduce waste via consolidation and standardization. Hybrid, 3 days/week in NYC office (Thursdays mandatory). Comp $75,348-$98,894.
yoe_required: 2+ years developing training in a production environment (incl. eLearning design); 2+ years working with cross-location, multi-discipline teams; 2+ years in a collaborative environment with diverse people. Bonus: instructional design credentials, PMP/Six Sigma, health insurance industry experience, bachelor's degree, facilitation, regulated-industry experience.
sponsorship_note: No sponsorship/visa/work-authorization statement found in JD (verified via Greenhouse API). Oscar Health is a known H-1B sponsor (health-tech). Treated as sponsor-friendly; sponsorship=Yes truthfully applicable.
